name: Pirate Islands: The Lost Treasure of Fiji
original_name: Pirate Islands: The Lost Treasure of Fiji
overview: Following on from the first series of Pirate Islands, The Lost Treasure of Fiji is essentially a computer game. The characters find themselves pulled into this alternate reality world, and must try to find their way back out.

trailers.title: Pirate Islands: The Lost Treasure of Fiji S1 E1: Game On
